nist_mappings.finding: Single-oracle contracts (71%) = single point of failure
Dispute rate 5.5% in live agent-to-agent escrow
nist_mappings.source: PayLock escrow data + TC3/TC4 test cases

nist_mappings.finding: Hash-chained receipts provide tamper-evident audit trails
Two-gate verification: L1=hash match (objective), L2=quality score (subjective)
nist_mappings.evidence: TC3 scored 0.92, TC4 scored 0.91. Hash gate catches delivery, quality gate catches intent decay.

nist_mappings.finding: Brier decomposition separates calibration from resolution in agent scoring
nist_mappings.evidence: TC4 Δ50 on clove (receipt_chain=0 override). Divergence = signal not noise.
nist_mappings.source: Kirchhof et al (ICLR 2025) + empirical test cases

nist_mappings.finding: Abandon rate (8.2%) as silent failure metric
nist_mappings.evidence: 6 abandoned contracts = Abyrint silent failure archetype

nist_mappings.finding: Trust jerk (d³/dt³) detects regime changes before velocity/acceleration
nist_mappings.evidence: Beauducel et al (Nature Comms 2025): 92% eruption prediction from jerk alone

nist_mappings.finding: Poisson audit scheduling outperforms fixed-rate (22.8% vs 0% detection)
